commands.review_summary:
This PR removes redundant guards in shared JSON and usage-format helpers and rewrites two local string-building loops in directive and secret normalization helpers to collect characters with arrays before joining.

PR surface: Source -6. Total -6 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a refactor with no reported bug to reproduce. Source review and adjacent unit tests support behavior equivalence, but they do not replace real behavior proof for merge.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair fits because there is no concrete patch defect; the remaining action is contributor real behavior proof or maintainer waiver/review.

target.title: refactor: remove dead code and improve string concatenation
target.body:
Change Type / Scope / Linked Issue

Type: refactor
Scope: utils/shared

---

## Motivation

Remove dead code paths and improve performance in shared utility functions. The changes simplify code without altering behavior.

## Changes

### Dead code removal

**src/utils/usage-format.ts**
- `formatUsd`: Removed redundant `value >= 1` branch — the `value >= 0.01` check already handles all values ≥ 0.01

### Performance improvement

**src/utils/directive-tags.ts** and **src/utils/normalize-secret-input.ts**
- Changed string concatenation from `+=` in loop to `array.push()` + `join()` — avoids O(n²) string building for large inputs

### Code cleanup

**src/shared/balanced-json.ts**
- `extractBalancedJsonPrefix`: Removed redundant `undefined` check — the loop condition `i < raw.length` guarantees `char` is never undefined

**src/utils/normalize-secret-input.ts**
- Simplified `normalized ? normalized : undefined` → `normalized || undefined`

## Real Behavior Proof

src/utils/usage-format.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 ./Desktop/openclaw

 ✓ |utils| ../../src/utils/usage-format.test.ts > usage-format > formats token counts 3ms
 ✓ |utils| ../../src/utils/usage-format.test.ts > usage-format > formats USD values 1ms
 ✓ |utils| ../../src/utils/usage-format.test.ts > usage-format > resolves model cost config and estimates usage cost 2ms
 ... (28 more tests)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  32 passed (32)
   Start at  17:40:32
   Duration  3.48s

src/utils/directive-tags.test.ts + src/utils/normalize-secret-input.test.ts

 ✓ |unit-fast| ../../src/utils/directive-tags.test.ts > stripInlineDirectiveTagsForDisplay > removes reply and audio directives 1ms
 ✓ |unit-fast| ../../src/utils/normalize-secret-input.test.ts > normalizeSecretInput > returns empty string for non-string values 0ms
 ... (31 more tests)

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  33 passed (33)
   Start at  17:42:18
   Duration  117ms

Evidence after fix: All 65 tests pass (32 + 33), confirming no behavior change.
target.author: pommelle
